diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderSend.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderSend.Codeunit.al
index 8ceee0cd..9a718a30 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderSend.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/ReminderSend.Codeunit.al
@@ -119,5 +119,19 @@ codeunit 6762 "Reminder-Send"
     local procedure OnBeforeGetDocumentSendingProfile(var IssuedReminderHeader: Record "Issued Reminder Header"; var DocumentSendingProfile: Record "Document Sending Profile"; var DocumentSendingProfileFound: Boolean; var IsHandled: Boolean)
     begin
     end;
+
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", OnAfterIsCustomerAccount, '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnAfterIsCustomerAccount(DocumentTableId: Integer; var IsCustomer: Boolean)
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            IsCustomer := true;
+    end;
+
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName, '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName(DocumentTableId: Integer; var FieldName: Text)
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            FieldName := 'Customer No.';
+    end;
 }

         xAmountType := "Amount Type";

-            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType()

             Modify()
